text: I feel a quiet curiosity being in this place. The environment is clean, modern, and structured, yet the slant of the images evokes a sense of displacement or perspective shift. Entering the R+D space, I am met with words about human connection with intelligent machines. There is a blend of anticipation and contemplation within me—an eagerness to understand both the machines and myself a little better. The atmosphere feels experimental, as if I am part of a test or the subject of someone else's observation.
